lines.text: The Suspended Ruins are ahead of us.
The Resonance Beacon here is still functioning, and the defense feature is intact too. We can catch our breath here.
The Ovathrax assault has been as brutal as expected. We've been cut off from our main forces.
It's the three of us against them all from here.
I tried to contact her and our base, but nothing came back. The Threnodian's power is possibly interfering with Terminal signals.
We have no choice but to trust them now. Let's press on.
We're bound to face a vicious fight.
We've reached the Suspended Ruins. We'll get going once you're ready.
The road ahead is completely blocked off.
You choose where the Disruptor's last blast hits. Make it count, Rover.
May it cleave out a path for us.
This amount of enemies... We cannot fire the Disruptor again...
Yangyang, you...
...Indeed, Yangyang. Turns out I was the one being indecisive.
Now, Rover...
Now, Rover...
Please make the call.
It seems the culprit is hidden deep within this statue.
This will be our final battle with the Threnodian. Rover, are you ready?
That's the spirit.
Indeed. We've come too far to turn back now.
Yes, so many have put their faith in us.
Being nervous is not necessarily detrimental; sometimes it helps you focus. Take a deep breath, and then...
Let's bring an end to this war, once and for all.
And that's thanks to your efforts, Wenshu.
Wenshu... Thank you, but you don't have to pitch me.
{PlayerName}, it's good to see you here.
It's not worth mentioning, Wenshu. This is the first Riverside Games in many years, and you must have been busy with various matters. I only offered a little help when I could.
{PlayerName}, it's a slow day today. Please, take a break and have some fun.
Indeed. I'm looking forward to your performance, {PlayerName}.
Only a few events specifically require participants to be Resonators. Other than that, there are no special restrictions for any event.
{PlayerName}, I suggest looking around for events to join if you're interested. Many of them are open to on-site registration.
Now, if you'll excuse me, I need to confirm the safety of the surroundings before the race begins. You can consult Wenshu should you need any assistance.
Have a great time, {PlayerName}.
{PlayerName} has told me what happened. I will join you.
Keep your chin up. Your hard work will pay off.
Not to mention the team you were talking about was a temporary team, too.
Yes. That was a... good race.
As you have trained together extensively, I trust you can decide the order better than me. I will gladly cooperate to the best of my abilities.
The first runner doesn't need to coordinate with the two of us; he only needs to exchange the controller with Lingyan. It's a safe arrangement indeed.
A reasonable strategy. I agree.
{PlayerName}, this is your first race, and you may receive plenty of attention as the last runner. Please stay calm and relax.
I'm glad to hear that.
Once I arrive at the exchange zone, go for the goal and don't look back. I'll take care of the rest.
I've always trusted your capabilities.
Any other questions?
Since {PlayerName} brought this team together, maybe we should let {Male=him;Female=her} decide the name.
Good, it sounds easy to remember.
Not bad. It helps to release the tension.
We can have this as the team name, though I wouldn't call myself a genius.
Considering your character, I was expecting something... different.
Nevertheless, it is a good name. I have no objection.
The name is settled, then. Everyone, please get ready in your designated exchange zones.
We can stay in touch with our Terminals once the race begins.
{PlayerName}, are you all right?
{PlayerName}, did you notice anything unusual before?
An unfamiliar voice briefly interrupted our team's channel...
Wenshu, let's evacuate the spectators now. Send them back to the city in batches.
When {PlayerName} asked me to team up with {Male=him;Female=her}, I heard something similar by the racing lane.
I have requested the monitoring data records of all nearby waterways from the Academy for safety measures.
There might be an underlying cause of this unusual behavior.
The records will take some more time to download. Evacuate the people first.
Get that person to leave first, and the others should follow.
Wenshu, I'm going with you.
Thank you.
May I have your hand?
Nothing major. I just need to confirm something.
As I expected.
The adrenaline from excitement may have dampened your sensitivity to pain.
However, your nervous response betrays your condition. You right hand has been shaking involuntarily, likely because the wound has been left untreated.
Fortunately, it's not caused by the Gulpuffs. Please take this to relieve the pain for now.
Can you fill us in on the data?
Why didn't the nearest Beacon pick up on this anomaly?
Yes.
The timing of this change is concerning. Why did it happen precisely during the Riverside Games?
Yes. Let's go.
{PlayerName}, what are you doing here? Have you found any event that you're interested in?
Trouble? If you're comfortable sharing, tell me about it. Maybe I can help.
So... you want me to join the relay as your temporary teammate?
No worries.
No.
The key to winning a relay race lies in mutual understanding, cooperation, and trust among team members.
Most of the teams are formed according to the Midnight Rangers units they belong to. Therefore, they're familiar with their teammates and have good teamwork.
I believe you can find a better candidate for your team. That candidate doesn't have to be me.
Disqualification for teams without enough participants... Yes, I remember that rule. I imagine your teammates would be greatly disappointed if that happened.
Joining you... I see. It might be fun.
But given we never trained together before, it may prove challenging to win.
A temporary team...
I'm fine, thank you for asking... It's been a long time since I last heard that phrase.
Indeed. No need to worry about the end result before the competition begins.
Yes... I'll join you.
Spectators are gathering along the lanes. The race should start soon.
Let's go join our new teammates.
Nothing... Perhaps it's just my imagination.
The Tacet Discords are increasing. Let's take them down first.
The voices are coming from here.
It might be trying to tell us something... We need to decipher the message somehow.
It's the cheers during the Riverside Games, mingled together with cries for help.
Perhaps some people have been trapped in this place, or maybe...
Anyway, we have to figure it out.
Thank you, Mortefi.
This is the frequency sample I've recorded.
Yes... Whatever you do, please keep it safe.
I trust you as always, Mortefi. But this sample... It means a lot to me.
This should be our wake-up call. The Waveworn Phenomena is more complicated than we thought.
Sure, I'll go talk to them once everything is settled here.
{PlayerName}, there is a place I need to visit. Could you come with me?
Thank you. I need to pick up something first. See you at Knell Square.
Sure. I'll be waiting for you at Knell Square.
There is something I wish to do with you today.
A seed.
This is the seed of a resilient type of flower, which I asked the Academy to help me breed years ago.
From here, you can see all of Jinzhou city.
I thought... those who died for Jinzhou would want to see how it's thriving now.
This flower... We named it the Emortia.
Yes. The word represents both "departure" and "return."
Yes. I know there's nothing we can do to bring them back, but for us still living, we need something like this to hold on to.
Thank you, {PlayerName}, for finally bringing them peace. Now, they no longer have to fight.
And this is why I believe you should be the one to plant this seed here.
We have prevented one Outbreak for the time being.
But a greater danger remains lurking in the darkness... Our knowledge of it is severely lacking.
I must act to prevent more deaths...
Thank you for your concern.
Every Midnight Ranger is prepared to die on the battlefield any day. I know this all too well as their general in command.
Helping the souls of our fallen ones return to their homeland... This is one of the few ways I can honor their sacrifices.
{PlayerName}, I have one more request.
If one day I perish in battle and cannot return home... Could you please plant one of these flowers for me?
Thank you, {PlayerName}.
...Begone!
The Thundering Mephis is a blend of countless fallen soldiers' Reverberations.
As long as more soldiers are still dying here, it will always return. Not to mention…
Countless souls of our brave soldiers remain trapped in this rain, to this day.
Sorry. I should've arrived sooner.
The honor is mine, Rover.
Yes, allow me to introduce myself. I am Jiyan, the current General of the Midnight Rangers.
Is that so? You're a mysterious individual with vast experience. If we had crossed paths before, I wouldn't be surprised.
The Phantoms are mere replicas of the past. Since this is our first time meeting, I wouldn't recognize you if I was one of them. But I do wish we could've met sooner, Rover.
Madam Magistrate and Taoqi have informed me of your willingness to assist us. Thank you for lending us a hand.
I should properly welcome you with Huanglong's formalities, but as the current situation forbids that, I'll brief you on our plans as fast as possible.
I've heard about your deeds from Madam Magistrate. You are a trustworthy ally according to her.
Here. It's the Retroact Rain antidote, developed by the Academy.
While the antidote cannot shield you from its effects entirely, it should at least lessen the hallucinations.
For someone to show up as a "Phantom" in the Retroact Rain, two conditions must be met:
Prior exposure to the rain, and a deep connection to the affected area.
You were found in the Gorges of Spirits only recently, and this is your first time setting foot in Jinzhou, ruling out that possibility.
Moreover... you possess a similar ability with the legendary hero who once absorbed a Threnodian. Jué prophesied about your arrival.
I was told you'd come to the Norfall Barrens one day... To reclaim your lost power from Ovathrax.
I'll do everything in my power to help you make that happen.
Yes. Madam Magistrate might not be aware of this, as it happened before she was appointed.
On the day I was selected to be the next General, Jué told me this...
"Beneath the full moon, guide the returning one to confront Threnodian. From the threat itself, {Male=he;Female=she} shall reclaim the power to conquer it."
And if you are indeed the "returning one" mentioned here, we may actually get rid of that monster once and for all.
You might have noticed something off about that moon. We call it the "Void Plenilune".
Once it fully takes shape... Ovathrax, the Threnodian of War, would be reawakening soon.
It is an ancient terror that reigns over our land, capable of devouring weapon frequencies to enhance itself.
The Norfall Barrens have become a massive graveyard of weapons after countless battles. Those weapons would've made it even stronger than before.
But we must act now. The Void Plenilune is already visible, we must contain the Threnodian swiftly. Any delay could allow it to recover and become harder to deal with.
To remain calm in such an extreme situation, your composure is admirable indeed.
Hold on! We cannot afford to rush the plan.
Fret not. Our enemy is strong, but not unbeatable. I am positive we will prevail.
We'll get into the specifics once we reach our base.
Well done.
...The rain has stopped.
...This is our only chance.
...Thank you for your trust, Madam Magistrate.
Target, the Norfall Barrens.
This rain... It's finally happening.
Yes. How's it going?
I see. Stay alert, we will continue as planned. Report any signs of potential TD Outbreaks immediately.
We march on to the Norfall Barrens as soon as the rain stops.
Defend the south gate! Enemy attack weakening. This wave is almost over!
Is that...
The Thundering Mephis?
General Geshu Lin... We fight to protect what we cherish.
And we cherish our comrades, not out of cowardice or fear, but out of trust. The trust in their lives' worth.
I cannot assure you I am always making the right choice, General.
But we should never build our victory on top of endless sacrifices.
Perhaps we are indeed, General. I share at least one thing with you. I, too, will draw my blade to fight for what I believe in... and I'll stop at nothing to see it through.
I am fine. Please go on.
It's time.
Attention all troops! Take position and get ready to engage!
"When the moon turns full, a roving traveler shall return"... The prophecy is being fulfilled.
Here they are.
They're not coming at us... Are they trying to protect something... Or are they waiting for commands?
With an TD Outbreak of this magnitude and organization, someone must be orchestrating it. Could it be...
Watch out!
Jianxin recently arrived at our base with one of the supply delivery teams. She has been a great help.
Please follow me.
Our main goal is to contain the reviving Threnodian, but we must beware of the Tacet Discords too. They have shown unpredictability in every past battle.
The Academy determined they were not native to the Norfall Barrens, and instead had been conjured by a mysterious power.
After analyzing their behavior, I believe the source of said power is none other than that statue.
While the Ovathrax is still weakened, we must seize the opportunity to act.
With looming danger from the continued onsets of TD Outbreaks, and many of our units injured and unable to fight, it is crucial to plan our attack wisely.
Please, join me in mapping out the strategic plans.
Good. Are we all clear on what to do?
Our next move is to reclaim the Disruptor and break through the Groundwave Barrier.
Rover, do you see that iridescent veil?
That's the Groundwave Barrier. Ovathrax set it up to absorb weapon frequencies in the Norfall Barrens without interruption.
One of our top priorities now is to protect the Disruptor from Tacet Discord attacks.
It's a powerful anti-Threnodian weapon from when Jinzhou was founded. We need it to break through this barrier.
I'll leave it to the professional to explain the details.
How's the preparation going on your side?
The Magistrate and I have it covered. Trust me.
I trust we all understand the situation now.
Rover, Yangyang, please go secure the Disruptor and fix its backup energy outlet.
Jianxin, please stay and guard the base. I’ll draw those Tacet Discords away.
Let's get moving.
Please update me on the situation in Jinzhou city.
I see. We have successfully contained the Outbreak here at the base.
I will go pick them up as soon as possible.
The rain's getting heavier...
There are signs of Tacet Discords reviving. Intense frequency fluctuations detected… they’ll be passing through that area. I must create a safe passage for them.
I need to clear the way for them as quickly as possible.
